iot.topicrule.elasticsearchaction.CfnAbo:
Describes an action that writes data to an Amazon OpenSearch Service domain.

**Note**  
The `Elasticsearch` action can only be used by existing rule actions. To create a new rule action or to update an existing rule action, use the `OpenSearch` rule action instead. For more information, see [OpenSearchAction](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot/latest/apireference/API_OpenSearchAction.html).

iot.topicrule.elasticsearchaction.Endpoi.Description: The endpoint of your OpenSearch domain.

iot.topicrule.elasticsearchaction.Id.Description: The unique identifier for the document you are storing.

iot.topicrule.elasticsearchaction.Index.Description: The index where you want to store your data.

iot.topicrule.elasticsearchaction.RoleAr.Description: The IAM role ARN that has access to OpenSearch.

iot.topicrule.elasticsearchaction.Type.Description: The type of document you are storing.
